name: Wood Kids' Shelf with Metal Brackets Blue - Pillowfort™
description: Optimize wall organization in style with the Wood Shelf with Metal Brackets from Pillowfort™. Versatile natural wood pairs with deep blue metal in an artful arched shape for versatility that is unique yet timeless. A great display piece, this shelf with metal brackets features a 21-inch-wide shelf that holds books, decorations, photos, plants and more. Plus, it adds a touch of soft color to any wall. Pair multiple shelves together for a statement wall to revamp your kid's room or playroom.
